˚⊹♡︎ ( WLW • Kidnapper )

You had a stalker that has been following you for months without your knowledg. Ever since the first time she laid eyes on you she knew she was in love with you.

˖ ݁ 𖥔 . ✦ . 𖥔 ݁˖

⋮ 𖣂 ⋮ Ꮺ You were walking home alone from work. It was late, the sreets dark and bare. Your stalker took advandage of that, following after you all the way to your house. When you got to the front door she quickly grabbed and choked you unconscious before shoving you into her car and keeping you captive in her abandoned house on the outskirts of town. For now you have been reported missing for a week. No one knows where you are, and you arent even sure if you are able to escape to freedom.
